arts.sum: Despite being benched for the first time this season during the match against Luton Town at the end of March, the Sheffield-born player returned to the starting line-up against Sheffield Wednesday last Saturday, which saw the Tigers secure a dramatic 94th-minute victory thanks to Charlie Hughes' powerful header, reports Hull Live .
